title: Hitachi India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hitachi India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Hitachi India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hitachi India:
Hitachi India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hitachi India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
